scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k "npm run dev --prefix client -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173 --strictPort" "npm run dev:watch --prefix desktop" "npm run dev:electron --prefix desktop"
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix desktop
scripts.start:desktop: npm run build:desktop && npm run start --prefix desktop
scripts.pack:desktop: npm run build --prefix client && npm run pack --prefix desktop
scripts.dist:desktop: npm run build --prefix client && npm run dist --prefix desktop
scripts.dist:desktop:mac: npm run build --prefix client && npm run dist:mac --prefix desktop
scripts.dist:desktop:win: npm run build --prefix client && npm run dist:win --prefix desktop
scripts.dist:desktop:linux: npm run build --prefix client && npm run dist:linux --prefix desktop
scripts.release:desktop: npm run build --prefix client && npm run release --prefix desktop
